query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) reduced to necessary columns

5.description: find parcels that intersect storm-surge areas (parcels x stormflo)

6.description: from parcels that intersect storm-surge, find those that also intersect flood zones (result x flom)

7.description: collapse to one row per teigid

10.description: return teigid and kommunenummer for the top 10 parcels

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, opphav, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='4204'));
